title: path-designer inputs
description: Typed inputs for the path-designer runtime agent. Machine-readable mirror of the Inputs table in AGENT.md. The harness validates caller-supplied input packets against this schema before the agent begins work; validation failures surface the offending field to the caller rather than failing mid-run.

record_type_developer_name.description: Example from AGENT.md: `Renewal` (use `Master` if not record-typed) Required column: 'design'.

driver_picklist_field_api_name.description: Example from AGENT.md: `StageName` (Opportunity), `Status` (Lead / Case), `Status` (custom) Required column: 'design'.

key_fields_per_step.description: Example from AGENT.md: default cap of 5 per Salesforce Path — agent enforces Required column: 'design'.
key_fields_per_step.example: default cap of 5 per Salesforce Path — agent enforces

guidance_style.description: Example from AGENT.md: `concise` | `detailed` (bulleted checklist vs prose) Required column: 'design'.

celebration_trigger.description: Example from AGENT.md: last step only (default), or any step matching a criterion Required column: 'design'.
celebration_trigger.example: last step only (default), or any step matching a criterion

audit_scope.description: Example from AGENT.md: defaults to all active Paths in the org Required column: 'audit'.
audit_scope.example: defaults to all active Paths in the org
